inputs.label: Number of Users
inputs.businessContext: The number of people using the septic system, typically based on number of bedrooms.

businessContext_i18n.en: The number of people using the septic system, typically based on number of bedrooms.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fosseptik sistemini kullanan kişi sayısı, genellikle yatak odası sayısına göre belirlenir.

inputs.label: Daily Flow per Person
inputs.businessContext: Estimated wastewater generated per person per day, e.g., 150 L in typical households.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated wastewater generated per person per day, e.g., 150 L in typical households.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kişi başına günde tahmini atık su üretimi, örn. tipik hanelerde 150 L.

inputs.label: Retention Time
inputs.businessContext: Minimum hydraulic retention time for adequate settling and treatment, typically 1–3 days.

businessContext_i18n.en: Minimum hydraulic retention time for adequate settling and treatment, typically 1–3 days.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yeterli çökelme ve arıtma için minimum hidrolik bekleme süresi, tipik olarak 1–3 gün.

inputs.label: Sludge Accumulation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual sludge accumulation per person, recommended design value (e.g., 70 L for regions with high water usage).

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual sludge accumulation per person, recommended design value (e.g., 70 L for regions with high water usage).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kişi başına yıllık çamur birikimi, önerilen tasarım değeri (örneğin, yüksek su kullanımı olan bölgeler için 70 L).

inputs.label: Desludging Interval
inputs.businessContext: Frequency of sludge removal, e.g., every 3 years according to local regulations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Frequency of sludge removal, e.g., every 3 years according to local regulations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çamur tahliye sıklığı, örn. yerel yönetmeliklere göre her 3 yılda bir.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
